f.description: Fixed cost to open each warehouse

c.description: Transportation cost from each warehouse to each customer

notes: We add implicit assumptions that sets $|I|, |J| > 0$ and parameters $u, f, c \geq 0$ and $d > 0$. *(TODO: why is $d > 0$ required?)*

EvoCut [v1](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.11850v1) proposes a hybrid inequality combining three lower bounds. We split this hybrid inequality into three separate inequalities to generate formulations `p6.b-d`.
EvoCut [v2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.11850v2) proposes a family of inequalities used to generate formulations `p6.e-j`.
